name: Native In-Memory Rate Limiter
description: Pure TypeScript in-memory rate limiter using a global Map cache. Zero external dependencies, zero environment variables required.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the client (e.g., user ID or IP address).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of allowed requests within the time window.

parameters.name: windowMs
parameters.description: The duration of the tracking window in milliseconds.
